collapse-pdf-outline-sections.title: Collapse PDF Outline Sections
collapse-pdf-outline-sections.description: Shows how to collapse all outline (bookmark) items in a PDF by setting the Open property of each OutlineItemCollection to false using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-acroform-text-field.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Text Field
create-pdf-with-acroform-text-field.description: Demonstrates how to create a new PDF, add an AcroForm, and place a text box field on the first page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-top-checkbox.title: Create PDF with Top‑Positioned Checkbox
create-pdf-with-top-checkbox.description: Demonstrates how to create a new PDF, add an AcroForm, and place a checkbox field near the top of the page using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

create-pdf-gender-radio-button.title: Create PDF with Gender Radio Button Group
create-pdf-gender-radio-button.description: Shows how to create a new PDF, add an AcroForm radio button field for gender with Male/Female options, and save the document.

add-listbox-to-pdf-form.title: Add List Box to PDF AcroForm
add-listbox-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF document, add a page, and insert a ListBoxField with country options into the document's AcroForm, then save the file.

create-acroform-textbox-appearance.title: Create AcroForm TextBox with Font and Color
create-acroform-textbox-appearance.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add an AcroForm text box field, and set its default appearance such as font, size, and color, along with border styling.

fill-pdf-text-field.title: Fill a PDF Text Field with Aspose.Pdf
fill-pdf-text-field.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, locate a text form field by its name, assign a string value, and save the modified document.

set-checkbox-field-in-pdf.title: Set Checkbox Field in PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
set-checkbox-field-in-pdf.description: Loads an existing PDF, locates a checkbox form field, sets its checked state based on input, and saves the modified document.

select-radio-button-option.title: Select Radio Button Option in PDF
select-radio-button-option.description: Loads an existing PDF, locates a radio button field by name, selects a specified option, and saves the updated document.

select-listbox-option-in-pdf-form.title: Select ListBox Option in PDF Form
select-listbox-option-in-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a ListBox form field, set its selected option by index, and save the modified document.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-dictionary.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from a Dictionary
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-dictionary.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over all form fields, and assigns values from a dictionary of field names to the matching fields before saving the result.

extract-pdf-form-field-value-to-json.title: Extract PDF Form Field Value and Print as JSON
extract-pdf-form-field-value-to-json.description: The example loads a PDF document, retrieves a specific form field by its name, exports the field's value to a JSON stream, and writes the JSON to the console.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all form field values, and serialize them into a JSON string.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Form Data to XFDF
export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and exporting all form annotations and field values to an XFDF (XML) file.

import-xml-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import XML Form Data into PDF Using XFA
import-xml-form-data-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, reading XML form data, assigning the XML to an XFA form in the PDF, and saving the filled document.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, export its form fields to a JSON string, and write the JSON to a file.

import-json-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import JSON Form Data into PDF
import-json-form-data-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import form field values from a JSON string using ImportFromJson, and save the populated document.

post-pdf-form-data-xml-to-remote-endpoin.title: Post PDF Form Data as XML to a Remote Endpoint
post-pdf-form-data-xml-to-remote-endpoin.description: Extracts form fields from a PDF, builds an XML representation, and posts it to a remote HTTP endpoint using Aspose.Pdf.

add-blank-page-to-pdf-form.title: Add Blank Page to PDF Form
add-blank-page-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF form, append a new blank page, and save the document while preserving all existing form fields.

add-new-page-with-acroform-fields.title: Add New Page with AcroForm Fields to PDF
add-new-page-with-acroform-fields.description: Shows how to append a blank page to an existing PDF and place fresh AcroForm fields (a text box and a checkbox) on that page using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-form-field-from-pdf.title: Delete a Form Field from PDF
delete-form-field-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove a specific form field from a PDF document by its name using Aspose.Pdf and save the updated file.

flatten-pdf-remove-form-fields.title: Flatten PDF to Remove Form Fields
flatten-pdf-remove-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flatten it to delete all form fields while keeping their visual values, and save the result as a plain, non‑interactive PDF.

set-form-field-border-color-width.title: Set Form Field Border Color and Width in PDF
set-form-field-border-color-width.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a specific form field, and apply corporate style guidelines by changing the field's border color and thickness using Aspose.Pdf.

highlight-required-form-fields.title: Highlight Required Form Fields in PDF
highlight-required-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate over its form fields, detect those marked as required, and change their background color to highlight them.

set-font-size-style-pdf-text-field.title: Set Font Size and Style of a PDF Text Field
set-font-size-style-pdf-text-field.description: Shows how to modify the font name, size, and color of a textbox form field in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-form-field-read-only.title: Set PDF Form Field to Read‑Only
set-pdf-form-field-read-only.description: Loads a PDF, finds a text box form field, marks it as read‑only to prevent further editing, and saves the updated document.

mark-pdf-form-field-as-required.title: Mark PDF Form Field as Required
mark-pdf-form-field-as-required.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate a specific form field, set its Required property so validation fails when empty, and save the updated document.

add-tooltip-to-pdf-form-field.title: Add Tooltip to PDF Form Field
add-tooltip-to-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates creating (or loading) a PDF, adding a TextBox form field, setting its tooltip via the AlternateName property, and saving the updated document.

set-default-value-for-pdf-form-field.title: Set Default Value for a PDF Form TextBox
set-default-value-for-pdf-form-field.description: Creates a PDF, adds a TextBox form field, and defines a default value that is displayed when the PDF is opened.

save-modified-pdf-to-new-file.title: Save Modified PDF to New File Preserving Original
save-modified-pdf-to-new-file.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, applying a simple modification (adding a page), and saving the result to a different file name so the source document remains unchanged.

save-pdf-incremental-update.title: Save PDF with Incremental Update to Preserve Revisions
save-pdf-incremental-update.description: Shows how to open an existing PDF, add a text annotation, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf's incremental update feature so previous revisions are retained.

batch-fill-identical-fields-in-pdfs.title: Batch Fill Identical Fields in Multiple PDFs
batch-fill-identical-fields-in-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over a folder of PDF files and populate specified form fields with the same values using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-fill-pdfs-with-xml-data.title: Batch Fill PDFs with XML Data
batch-fill-pdfs-with-xml-data.description: Shows how to loop through a directory of PDF files, locate matching XML form data, bind the XML to each PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and save the filled PDFs to an output folder.

batch-export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf.title: Batch Export PDF Form Data to XFDF
batch-export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files and export each document's form annotations and field values to separate XFDF (XML) files using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv.title: Export PDF Form Fields to CSV
export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, export its form fields to JSON, and convert that data into a CSV file for spreadsheet import.

validate-required-form-fields-before-sav.title: Validate Required Form Fields Before Saving PDF
validate-required-form-fields-before-sav.description: The example loads a PDF, checks that all form fields marked as required contain non‑empty values, and saves the document only if validation succeeds.

create-pdf-with-acroform-absolute-coordi.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Fields Using Absolute Coordinates
create-pdf-with-acroform-absolute-coordi.description: Shows how to add a text box and a checkbox AcroForm field to a PDF at precise absolute positions using Aspose.Pdf.

create-acroform-textbox-relative-margins.title: Create AcroForm TextBox with Relative Positioning Using Margins
create-acroform-textbox-relative-margins.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with an AcroForm text box positioned relative to page margins and add its appearance using Aspose.Pdf.

populate-xfa-form-fields.title: Populate XFA Form Fields in a PDF
populate-xfa-form-fields.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with an XFA form, assigning new XFA XML data, setting individual XFA field values, and saving the populated document.

extract-xfa-form-data-to-xml.title: Extract XFA Form Data from PDF to XML
extract-xfa-form-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, verify that it contains an XFA form, retrieve the XFA data package as an XmlDocument, and save it as an XML file.

import-xfa-data-into-pdf.title: Import XFA Data from XML into PDF
import-xfa-data-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load XFA XML data and assign it to a PDF that contains an XFA form using Aspose.Pdf, then save the updated document.

merge-pdfs-with-acroform-field-renaming.title: Merge PDFs with AcroForm Field Renaming
merge-pdfs-with-acroform-field-renaming.description: Demonstrates how to merge two PDF documents that contain AcroForm fields while renaming the source fields to prevent name collisions.

flatten-pdf-form-fields-after-filling.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields After Filling
flatten-pdf-form-fields-after-filling.description: Loads a PDF, fills specific form fields (text box, checkbox, radio button) and then flattens the form so the entered values become part of the page content, resulting in a non‑editable PDF.

restore-editable-form-fields-from-flatte.title: Restore Editable Form Fields from Flattened PDF
restore-editable-form-fields-from-flatte.description: Shows how to unflatten a previously flattened PDF form by enabling AutoRestoreForm and making form annotations independent, thereby restoring editability of form fields.

set-custom-font-form-field.title: Set Custom Font for PDF Form Field
set-custom-font-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to load an external TrueType font, embed it, and apply it as the default appearance of a text box form field in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-form-field-label-45-degrees.title: Rotate Form Field Label by 45 Degrees
rotate-form-field-label-45-degrees.description: Shows how to rotate a PDF form field's label (rectangle) 45° using Aspose.Pdf.

hide-pdf-form-field.title: Hide PDF Form Field Using Aspose.Pdf
hide-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to hide a PDF form field by setting the Hidden annotation flag or applying a HideAction with Aspose.Pdf.

set-form-field-visible-non-printable.title: Set Form Field Visible but Non‑Printable
set-form-field-visible-non-printable.description: Demonstrates how to keep a PDF form field visible on screen while preventing it from being printed by applying the NoPrint annotation flag.

import-xml-form-data-from-string.title: Import XML Form Data from String into PDF
import-xml-form-data-from-string.description: Shows how to load an XML string and import it into an XFA PDF form using Aspose.Pdf's core API.

export-pdf-form-data-to-pretty-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to Pretty-Printed JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-pretty-json.description: Demonstrates how to export all form fields from a PDF document to a JSON file with indented (pretty-printed) output using Aspose.Pdf.

import-form-data-from-compressed-json.title: Import Form Data from Compressed JSON into PDF
import-form-data-from-compressed-json.description: Demonstrates how to decompress a GZIP‑compressed JSON payload and import its form field values into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-multi-page-pdf-with-acroform-fiel.title: Create Multi‑Page PDF with Different AcroForm Fields
create-multi-page-pdf-with-acroform-fiel.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with three pages, each containing a distinct AcroForm field (text box, combo box, and checkbox) using Aspose.Pdf.

copy-form-field-to-another-page.title: Copy Form Field to Another Page in PDF
copy-form-field-to-another-page.description: Shows how to duplicate an existing form field and place the copy on a different page of the same PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

rename-pdf-form-field.title: Rename PDF Form Field Programmatically
rename-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate an existing form field, rename its name, partial name, and mapping name, and then save the updated document.

clone-form-field-to-another-page.title: Clone a Form Field to Another PDF Page
clone-form-field-to-another-page.description: Shows how to duplicate an existing form field, adjust its properties, and place the cloned field on a different page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

assign-javascript-onlostfocus-action.title: Assign JavaScript OnLostFocus Action to PDF Form Field
assign-javascript-onlostfocus-action.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript snippet to a PDF form field that runs when the field loses focus, using Aspose.Pdf to modify the document and enable auto‑recalculation.

add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add Submit Button to PDF Form
add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to create a push button on a PDF page and configure it to post all form fields to a specified URL using Aspose.Pdf.

set-calculation-order-pdf-form-fields.title: Define Calculation Order for Dependent PDF Form Fields
set-calculation-order-pdf-form-fields.description: Loads a PDF form, enables automatic recalculation, assigns a JavaScript calculation to a total field, and specifies the evaluation order so dependent totals update automatically as inputs change.

add-numeric-field-with-range-validation.title: Add Numeric Field with Range Validation to PDF
add-numeric-field-with-range-validation.description: Demonstrates creating a numeric form field in a PDF and attaching JavaScript to ensure the entered value falls within a specified range.

list-pdf-form-field-names.title: List All PDF Form Field Names
list-pdf-form-field-names.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm collection, and enumerate the names of all form fields present in the document.

filter-pdf-form-textbox-fields.title: Filter PDF Form TextBox Fields Using LINQ
filter-pdf-form-textbox-fields.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, using a LINQ query to retrieve only TextBoxField form fields, setting a default value for each, and saving the modified document.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v2.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON Schema
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF document, export its form fields as a JSON schema file, and inspect serialization results using Aspose.Pdf.

import-acroform-fields-from-json.title: Import AcroForm Fields from JSON into PDF
import-acroform-fields-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to read a JSON schema that defines AcroForm fields and import those fields into a newly created PDF using Aspose.Pdf's ImportFromJson method.

fill-pdf-form-and-encrypt-aes256.title: Fill PDF Form and Apply AES-256 Encryption
fill-pdf-form-and-encrypt-aes256.description: The example loads a PDF, fills specific form fields, sets printing and content extraction permissions, encrypts the document with AES‑256 using user and owner passwords, and saves the protected file.

digitally-sign-pdf-form.title: Digitally Sign a PDF Form with Aspose.Pdf
digitally-sign-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with filled form fields, adding a signature field, applying a PKCS#7 digital signature, and saving the signed document.

set-pdf-metadata-after-form-processing.title: Set PDF Metadata After Form Processing
set-pdf-metadata-after-form-processing.description: Shows how to load a PDF, fill a form field, and then assign document metadata such as author, title, subject, and keywords before saving the file.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-byte-array.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from Byte Array
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-byte-array.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a memory stream, set specified form field values, and return the updated PDF as a byte array using Aspose.Pdf.

import-xml-form-data-into-pdf-async.title: Import XML Form Data into PDF Asynchronously
import-xml-form-data-into-pdf-async.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF on a background thread, assigning XFA form data from an XML file, and saving the updated PDF using async methods to avoid blocking the main thread.

fill-pdf-form-fields-in-parallel.title: Fill PDF Form Fields in Parallel
fill-pdf-form-fields-in-parallel.description: Shows how to load multiple PDF forms, assign values to specified fields, and save the filled documents concurrently using Parallel.ForEach to boost batch processing performance.

log-pdf-form-field-modifications.title: Log PDF Form Field Modifications
log-pdf-form-field-modifications.description: Shows how to modify, add, delete, and change properties of PDF form fields while writing each change to a log file for audit and troubleshooting.

pdf-fields-summary-report.title: Generate Summary Report of PDF Form Fields
pdf-fields-summary-report.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through form fields in multiple PDF files, collect their names and values, and create a summary PDF report using Aspose.Pdf.

compare-pdf-form-data-diff-report.title: Compare PDF Form Data and Generate Diff Report
compare-pdf-form-data-diff-report.description: Loads two PDFs, extracts their form fields, identifies mismatched values, and creates a PDF report with a table summarizing the differences.

create-pdf-template-with-placeholders.title: Create PDF Template with Placeholder Form Fields
create-pdf-template-with-placeholders.description: Shows how to generate a PDF template containing text box and checkbox form fields with placeholder values using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-current-date-into-pdf-form-field.title: Insert Current Date into PDF Form Field
insert-current-date-into-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates creating a DateField in an existing PDF, assigning the current system date to it, and saving the updated document.

create-multi-select-list-box.title: Create Multi-Select List Box in PDF
create-multi-select-list-box.description: Demonstrates how to add a list box form field to a PDF, enable multi‑selection, populate it with options, and pre‑select multiple items using Aspose.Pdf.

populate-pdf-combobox-from-database.title: Populate PDF ComboBox from Database
populate-pdf-combobox-from-database.description: Shows how to retrieve a list of values (mocked) and programmatically create a ComboBox form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then save the document.

add-signature-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add Signature Field to PDF Form
add-signature-field-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to insert a visible signature field into an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, including setting its appearance and border.

extract-signature-appearance-image.title: Extract Signature Field Appearance as Image
extract-signature-appearance-image.description: Shows how to locate a signature form field in a PDF document and extract its visual appearance as a PNG image for audit logging.

set-max-length-pdf-form-text-field.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Form Text Field
set-max-length-pdf-form-text-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a text box form field, set its maximum character length, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-form-textbox-with-spell-check.title: Create PDF Form TextBox with Spell Check
create-pdf-form-textbox-with-spell-check.description: Shows how to add a TextBoxField to a PDF document and enable spell checking using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF document and saves its form fields and complete model to an XML file for offline data collection.

validate-xml-xsd-fill-xfa-pdf.title: Validate XML with XSD and Fill XFA PDF Form
validate-xml-xsd-fill-xfa-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to validate an XML file against an XSD schema and then import the validated data into an XFA PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

transform-xml-xsl-into-pdf-form.title: Transform XML with XSLT and Populate PDF Form Fields
transform-xml-xsl-into-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to apply an XSLT transformation to an XML file, then import the transformed XML into an AcroForm PDF using Aspose.Pdf's BindXml method and save the filled document.

create-pdf-with-acroform-calculation.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Fields and Calculation JavaScript
create-pdf-with-acroform-calculation.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF, add AcroForm text fields for quantity, price, and total, and attach JavaScript to automatically compute the total amount.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv__v2.title: Export PDF Form Fields to CSV
export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv__v2.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts each form field's name, value, page index and rectangle, and writes the information to a CSV file for external analysis.

add-hidden-session-identifier-field-to-p.title: Add Hidden Session Identifier Field to PDF
add-hidden-session-identifier-field-to-p.description: Shows how to insert a hidden, read‑only text box field into an existing PDF to store a session identifier for backend tracking.

set-default-appearance-for-pdf-form-fiel.title: Set Default Appearance for a PDF Form Field
set-default-appearance-for-pdf-form-fiel.description: Shows how to create a text box form field in a PDF and define its DefaultAppearance (font, size, and color) using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf__v2.title: Export PDF Form Data to XFDF
export-pdf-form-data-to-xfdf__v2.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracting its form (annotation) data and writing it as XFDF (XML) directly to a stream.

import-xfdf-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Form Data from Network into PDF
import-xfdf-form-data-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF template, download XFDF XML form data via HTTP, and import the field values into the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

bulk-fill-pdf-form-fields-from-json.title: Bulk Fill PDF Form Fields from JSON with Graceful Missing Field Handling
bulk-fill-pdf-form-fields-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to populate all form fields in a PDF using data from a JSON file while skipping fields that are not present in the JSON without throwing errors.

read-xml-with-fallback-defaults.title: Read XML with Fallback Defaults Using Aspose.Pdf XmpPdfAExtensionSchema
read-xml-with-fallback-defaults.description: Shows how to extract custom XML elements and supply default values from Aspose.Pdf's XmpPdfAExtensionSchema when the source XML is missing those elements, then writes the resolved data to a new XML file.

set-dashed-border-for-pdf-form-field.title: Set Dashed Border for PDF Form Field
set-dashed-border-for-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a text box form field, and apply a dashed border style with a custom dash pattern using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-textbox-beveled-border.title: Create a PDF Text Box with Beveled Border
create-pdf-textbox-beveled-border.description: Shows how to add a text box form field to a PDF document and configure its border style to beveled for a three‑dimensional look using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-background-image-to-pdf-form-field.title: Apply Background Image to PDF Form Field
apply-background-image-to-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to set an image as the background of an XFA or AcroForm field in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, with fallback handling for different field types.

export-pdf-form-data-to-indented-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to Indented JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-indented-json.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, extract its form fields, and export them to a formatted JSON file using Aspose.Pdf with indentation enabled for readability.

import-form-data-from-json-via-rest-api.title: Import Form Data from JSON via REST API
import-form-data-from-json-via-rest-api.description: Shows how to load a PDF form, fetch JSON data from a REST endpoint, populate the form fields using ImportFromJson, and save the filled PDF.

create-rtl-textbox-field-in-pdf-form.title: Create Right-to-Left TextBox Field in PDF Form
create-rtl-textbox-field-in-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to add a text box form field that supports right‑to‑left languages such as Arabic by setting right alignment and using a Unicode font.

center-align-textbox-field.title: Center Align TextBox Field in PDF
center-align-textbox-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a TextBox form field and set its horizontal alignment to center using Aspose.Pdf.

create-right-aligned-number-field.title: Create Right-Aligned Number Field in PDF
create-right-aligned-number-field.description: Shows how to add a numeric form field to a PDF document and set its text alignment to right using Aspose.Pdf.

add-date-picker-field-to-pdf.title: Add Date Picker Field to PDF with JavaScript
add-date-picker-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a DateField on an existing PDF, set its display format, and attach JavaScript that opens the built‑in calendar picker when the field is activated.

add-formatted-currency-field-to-pdf.title: Add Formatted Currency Field to PDF
add-formatted-currency-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF form with a NumberField that displays a currency value formatted with a symbol and thousand separators, then saves the document.

validate-email-form-field-before-saving-.title: Validate Email Form Field Before Saving PDF
validate-email-form-field-before-saving-.description: Loads a PDF, checks that the 'email' text form field contains an '@' character, and saves the document only if the validation succeeds.

remove-form-field-from-pdf.title: Remove a Form Field from PDF
remove-form-field-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a form field by its name, delete the field using Aspose.Pdf, and save the modified document.

insert-form-field-at-specific-index.title: Insert Form Field at Specific Index in PDF
insert-form-field-at-specific-index.description: Shows how to add a new TextBox form field to a PDF and place it at a specific index in the document's Form collection to control the layout order.

create-pdf-acroform-open-js.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Text Field and Open-Action JavaScript
create-pdf-acroform-open-js.description: Shows how to add an AcroForm text field to a PDF and set a document‑level JavaScript action that runs when the PDF is opened, using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-data-to-compressed-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to Compressed JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-compressed-json.description: Demonstrates extracting PDF form fields as JSON and compressing the output with GZip for efficient storage or transmission.

import-encrypted-xfa-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import Encrypted XFA Form Data into PDF
import-encrypted-xfa-form-data-into-pdf.description: The example decrypts an AES‑encrypted XML file containing XFA form data and assigns it to a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

set-rich-text-field-html.title: Set Rich Text Field Content with HTML in PDF
set-rich-text-field-html.description: Demonstrates how to add a RichTextBoxField to a PDF page and assign HTML markup to its FormattedValue so the text appears with bold, italic, and underline styling.

create-pdf-with-acroform-tooltips.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Fields and Tooltips
create-pdf-with-acroform-tooltips.description: Shows how to generate a PDF, add a text box and a push‑button AcroForm field, and assign tooltips via the AlternateName property.

import-form-data-from-json.title: Import Form Data from JSON into PDF
import-form-data-from-json.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, reading a JSON array of form field values, bulk importing the data into the PDF form using Aspose.Pdf's ImportFromJson method, and saving the updated document.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-custom-root.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML with Custom Root Element
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-custom-root.description: Demonstrates how to export form fields from a PDF to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf, then rename the XML root element to meet external system requirements.

add-calculated-sum-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add Calculated Sum Field to PDF Form Using JavaScript
add-calculated-sum-field-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates creating numeric form fields and a calculated field that sums them with JavaScript in an Aspose.Pdf document.

set-datefield-default-time.title: Set DateField Default Time in PDF
set-datefield-default-time.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, add a DateField, set its display format to HH:mm:ss, assign the current system time as the default value, and save the document.

create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field.title: Create PDF Form with Barcode Field
create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF document, add a form page, and place a Code128 barcode field that can be used for product identifiers or tracking numbers.

add-dynamic-barcode-field-to-pdf.title: Add Dynamic Barcode Field to PDF
add-dynamic-barcode-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a barcode form field with a runtime‑generated GUID, and saving the document with the new barcode.

validate-required-pdf-form-fields-export.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields and Export to JSON
validate-required-pdf-form-fields-export.description: The example loads a PDF, checks that all fields marked as required contain a non‑empty value, and if validation passes, exports the form data to a JSON file.

verify-pdf-form-field-count.title: Verify PDF Form Field Count Before Processing
verify-pdf-form-field-count.description: Loads a PDF, checks that the number of form fields matches an expected count using Document.Form.Count, optionally updates a field, and saves the document.

create-pdf-with-acroform-fields-and-marg.title: Create PDF with AcroForm Fields and Page Margins
create-pdf-with-acroform-fields-and-marg.description: Demonstrates how to set uniform page margins in an Aspose.Pdf document before adding AcroForm fields, and how to create and configure TextBox and Button fields with borders.

load-pdf-edit-form-fields.title: Load PDF and Edit Form Fields with FormEditor
load-pdf-edit-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to load an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor, optionally modify form field values, and save the result to a new file.

set-character-limit-on-pdf-form-field.title: Set Character Limit on PDF Form Field
set-character-limit-on-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to restrict a PDF form text field to a maximum of 50 characters using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

get-character-limit-of-pdf-form-textbox.title: Get Character Limit of a PDF Form TextBox Field
get-character-limit-of-pdf-form-textbox.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a text box form field named "Address", and retrieve its character limit using the MaxLen property.

add-checkbox-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add Checkbox Field to PDF Form
add-checkbox-field-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a CheckboxField named 'AgreeTerms', add it to the document's form, and save the updated PDF.

delete-form-field-from-pdf__v2.title: Delete a Form Field from PDF
delete-form-field-from-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, delete a specific form field using Document.Form.Delete, and save the updated document.

remove-typewriter-form-fields-page-three.title: Remove Typewriter Form Fields on Page Three
remove-typewriter-form-fields-page-three.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber to load page three of a PDF and delete all Typewriter (TextBox) form fields from that page.

delete-form-fields-on-page.title: Delete Form Fields on a Specific PDF Page
delete-form-fields-on-page.description: Loads a PDF, locates all widget annotations on a given page, removes the associated form fields from the document's Form collection, and saves the cleaned document.

export-acroform-data-to-xml.title: Export AcroForm Data to XML (XFDF)
export-acroform-data-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF document and exports all AcroForm (form field) data to an XFDF XML file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-acroform-data-from-xfdf-xml.title: Import AcroForm Data from XFDF/XML into PDF
import-acroform-data-from-xfdf-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read XFDF/XML form data, import the field values into the document's AcroForm, and save the updated PDF.

add-submit-button-to-pdf-form__v2.title: Add Submit Button to PDF Form
add-submit-button-to-pdf-form__v2.description: Shows how to create a push button field in a PDF that posts form data to a specified URL using Aspose.Pdf.

configure-submit-button-action.title: Configure Submit Button Action and URL in PDF
configure-submit-button-action.description: Demonstrates how to add a button field to a PDF, set its SubmitForm action, and assign a submission URL programmatically using Aspose.Pdf.

truncate-textboxfield-input-maxlen.title: Truncate TextBoxField Input Exceeding Max Length
truncate-textboxfield-input-maxlen.description: Demonstrates how to set a maximum length on a PDF form TextBoxField, assign a longer string, and verify that Aspose.Pdf automatically truncates the excess characters.

apply-custom-font-to-pdf-form-fields.title: Apply Custom Font to All PDF Form Fields
apply-custom-font-to-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF, loop through every form field, set a custom font, size, and color via the DefaultAppearance property, and save the updated document.

batch-set-comments-max-length.title: Batch Set Max Length for PDF Form Comments Field
batch-set-comments-max-length.description: Shows how to loop through a directory of PDF files and set a 100‑character limit on the 'Comments' text box field using Aspose.Pdf.

form-fields-report-multiple-pdfs.title: Form Fields Report Across Multiple PDFs
form-fields-report-multiple-pdfs.description: Iterates through a list of PDF files, extracts each form field's name, type, and character limit (for text fields), and prints a formatted report.

update-pdf-form-fields.title: Update PDF Form Fields with Aspose.Pdf
update-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, modifying a text box and a checkbox form field, and saving the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

export-acroform-data-to-xfdf.title: Export AcroForm Data to XFDF on Network Share
export-acroform-data-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF containing AcroForm fields and export the form data to an XFDF (XML) file saved directly to a UNC network share.

import-xfdf-form-data-into-multiple-pdfs.title: Import XFDF Form Data into Multiple PDFs
import-xfdf-form-data-into-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to import XML (XFDF) form data into several PDF documents simultaneously, synchronizing user inputs across the files.

flatten-first-page-form-fields.title: Flatten First Page Form Fields in PDF
flatten-first-page-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flatten (remove) all interactive form fields on the first page, and save the result as a clean template page.

add-paymentmethod-radio-button-group.title: Add PaymentMethod Radio Button Group to PDF
add-paymentmethod-radio-button-group.description: Demonstrates how to create a radio button group named 'PaymentMethod' with 'Credit' and 'Debit' options in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

set-default-selected-radio-button-value.title: Set Default Selected Radio Button Value in PDF Form
set-default-selected-radio-button-value.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically set the default selected option of a radio button field in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

add-multiline-feedback-text-field.title: Add Multiline Feedback Text Field to PDF
add-multiline-feedback-text-field.description: Demonstrates how to insert a multiline TextBoxField named 'Feedback' with a 500‑character limit into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-signature-form-fields.title: Remove Signature Form Fields from PDF
remove-signature-form-fields.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF's form collection, identify fields of subtype 'Signature', and delete them using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv__v3.title: Export PDF Form Fields to CSV
export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv__v3.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, read each form field's name and current value, and write the data to a CSV file for external processing.

populate-pdf-form-fields-from-csv.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from CSV
populate-pdf-form-fields-from-csv.description: Shows how to read a CSV file, map its columns to PDF form field names, fill the matching fields in a PDF template using Aspose.Pdf, and save the filled document.

create-hidden-timestamp-form-field.title: Create Hidden Timestamp Form Field in PDF
create-hidden-timestamp-form-field.description: Demonstrates setting the PDF creation date metadata and adding a hidden, read‑only DateField that stores the UTC creation timestamp for audit purposes.

set-form-field-read-only.title: Set PDF Form Field to Read‑Only
set-form-field-read-only.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a form field named "EmployeeID", and make it read‑only so users cannot modify its value, then save the updated document.

flatten-pdf-form-fields.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields
flatten-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flatten all interactive form fields into static content, and save the resulting document.

copy-form-fields-between-pdfs.title: Copy Form Fields Between PDFs
copy-form-fields-between-pdfs.description: Shows how to load a source and destination PDF, clone each form field from the source, add them to the destination document, and save the combined result.

create-pdf-country-dropdown.title: Create a PDF Country Dropdown (ComboBox) Field
create-pdf-country-dropdown.description: Shows how to add a ComboBox (dropdown) form field to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and populate it with a predefined list of country names.

set-default-country-dropdown-formeditor.title: Set Default Selected Country in PDF Dropdown Using FormEditor
set-default-country-dropdown-formeditor.description: Demonstrates how to add a combo box field to a PDF and set its default selected value to "United States" using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade.

validate-age-numberfield-input.title: Validate NumberField Input for Age
validate-age-numberfield-input.description: Demonstrates creating a NumberField in a PDF, restricting it to numeric characters, and confirming that alphabetic input is rejected via InvalidValueFormatException.

add-calculation-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add Calculation Button to PDF Form
add-calculation-button-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to insert a push‑button into an existing PDF form and attach JavaScript that reads Quantity and UnitPrice fields, computes the total, and writes the result back to the Total field.

remove-javascript-actions-from-pdf-form-.title: Remove JavaScript Actions from PDF Form Fields
remove-javascript-actions-from-pdf-form-.description: Shows how to iterate through all form fields in a PDF and clear any attached JavaScript actions using Aspose.Pdf, enhancing document security before distribution.

export-form-field-appearances.title: Export Form Field Appearance Streams to PDF Files
export-form-field-appearances.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its form fields, extracts each field's appearance stream onto a new page, and saves that page as an independent PDF for visual inspection.

import-image-appearance-to-pdf-button.title: Import Image as Button Appearance in PDF
import-image-appearance-to-pdf-button.description: Shows how to load a PDF, retrieve or create a button form field, assign a custom image as its normal appearance, and apply simple styling using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-xml.title: Batch Convert PDFs to XML Form Data
batch-convert-pdfs-to-xml.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, load each with Aspose.Pdf, and save it as an XML form‑data file while preserving the original file name.

synchronize-pdf-form-data-xml.title: Synchronize PDF Form Data via XML Export/Import
synchronize-pdf-form-data-xml.description: Shows how to export form field values from a source PDF to an XML file and then import that XML into another PDF to keep the form data synchronized.

create-xfa-form-field-and-flatten-pdf.title: Create XFA Form Field and Flatten PDF
create-xfa-form-field-and-flatten-pdf.description: The example demonstrates adding an XFA‑compatible text box field to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flattening the form so the field becomes static content, and saving the resulting document.

replace-xfa-with-acroform.title: Replace XFA Form with AcroForm Using XML Template
replace-xfa-with-acroform.description: Shows how to convert a dynamic XFA form to a standard AcroForm and create text fields based on definitions from an external XML template.

set-tooltip-email-form-field.title: Set Tooltip for Email Form Field in PDF
set-tooltip-email-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate the "Email" form field, set a tooltip (alternate name) to guide users on the required email format, and save the updated document.

highlight-mandatory-text-fields.title: Highlight Mandatory Text Fields with Red Border
highlight-mandatory-text-fields.description: Shows how to mark a text box form field as required and change its border color to red in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-signature-field-with-image-appearanc.title: Add Signature Field with Image Appearance to PDF
add-signature-field-with-image-appearanc.description: Shows how to create a signature form field named 'ClientSignature' in a PDF and set its visual appearance to a predefined image stamp using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-and-lock-pdf-signature-field.title: Sign and Lock a PDF Signature Field
sign-and-lock-pdf-signature-field.description: Shows how to digitally sign a PDF signature field with a certificate and then lock the field to prevent further modifications during document review.

create-hidden-calculation-field.title: Create Hidden Calculation Field Summing Item1 and Item2
create-hidden-calculation-field.description: Shows how to add a hidden, read‑only number field to a PDF and attach JavaScript that calculates the sum of two existing fields (Item1 and Item2) using Aspose.Pdf.

export-selected-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.title: Export Selected PDF Form Fields to XML
export-selected-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.description: Shows how to export only specific form fields from a PDF document to an XML file by providing a list of field names.

import-xml-update-pdf-form-fields.title: Import XML Data and Update PDF Form Fields
import-xml-update-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load an XML file containing a subset of form field values, locate matching fields in a PDF, and update those fields using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-date-field-format-pdf.title: Add Date Field with MM/DD/YYYY Validation to PDF
validate-date-field-format-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF form, add a DateField, and attach JavaScript that validates the input against the MM/DD/YYYY pattern.

set-max-length-pdf-textbox-field.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF TextBox Field
set-max-length-pdf-textbox-field.description: Shows how to add a TextBoxField to a PDF form and enforce a maximum length of 20 characters using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-fill-pdf-forms-from-csv.title: Batch Fill PDF Forms from CSV Data
batch-fill-pdf-forms-from-csv.description: Reads a CSV file, selects a PDF template for each row, fills the form fields with the row values, and saves the filled PDFs to an output folder.

import-xml-form-data-with-missing-file-h.title: Import XML Form Data into PDF with Missing File Handling
import-xml-form-data-with-missing-file-h.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, conditionally binding XML form data with error handling for missing files, adding a status annotation, and saving the result.

set-form-field-visibility-based-on-anoth.title: Set Form Field Visibility Based on Another Field
set-form-field-visibility-based-on-anoth.description: Shows how to attach JavaScript to a PDF form field with Aspose.Pdf to toggle the visibility of a target field depending on the source field's value.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v3.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON Schema
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v3.description: Shows how to load a PDF containing form fields and export their definitions to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-json-schema-to-pdf-acroform.title: Import JSON Schema to Generate AcroForm Fields in PDF
import-json-schema-to-pdf-acroform.description: Shows how to import a JSON form schema and automatically create matching AcroForm fields in a new PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-checked-checkbox-field.title: Create a Checked Checkbox Field in PDF
create-checked-checkbox-field.description: Shows how to add a checkbox form field to a PDF document and set its default state to checked using Aspose.Pdf.

add-http-post-submit-button-to-pdf.title: Add HTTP POST Submit Button to PDF Form
add-http-post-submit-button-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a push‑button field in a PDF and configuring a SubmitFormAction to send the form data via HTTP POST using URL‑encoded format.

unit-test-submit-form-action-mock-http.title: Unit Test Submit Form Action with Mock HTTP POST
unit-test-submit-form-action-mock-http.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF containing a text box and a submit button using Aspose.Pdf, then unit‑testing the SubmitFormAction by mocking an HttpClient to verify a 200 OK response.

add-reset-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add Reset Button to PDF Form
add-reset-button-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to insert a push button into a PDF that clears all form fields when clicked by using a JavaScript action.

create-radio-button-with-export-values.title: Create Radio Button Field with Export Values in PDF
create-radio-button-with-export-values.description: Shows how to add a radio button group to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, assign custom export values to each option, and save the document.

create-pdf-with-hidden-guid-tracking-fie.title: Create PDF with Hidden GUID Tracking Field
create-pdf-with-hidden-guid-tracking-fie.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF that contains a hidden text box form field storing a runtime‑generated GUID for tracking purposes.

extract-transform-import-pdf-form-data.title: Extract, Transform, and Import PDF Form Data via JSON
extract-transform-import-pdf-form-data.description: Demonstrates how to export form fields from a source PDF to JSON, modify the JSON schema, and import the transformed data into another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-initial-zoom-level-pdf-form.title: Set Initial Zoom Level for PDF Form Using FormEditor
set-initial-zoom-level-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF form to open with a specific zoom factor by creating an explicit destination and assigning it as the document's OpenAction using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

add-tooltip-to-pdf-submit-button.title: Add Tooltip to PDF Submit Button
add-tooltip-to-pdf-submit-button.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a submit button that includes a tooltip explaining required fields before submission, using Aspose.Pdf form APIs.

lock-all-pdf-form-fields.title: Lock All PDF Form Fields (Read‑Only)
lock-all-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to set every form field in a PDF to read‑only using Aspose.Pdf, optionally flatten the form, and save the locked document.

create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field__v2.title: Create PDF Form with Code128 Barcode Field
create-pdf-form-with-barcode-field__v2.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF form containing a read‑only Code128 barcode field using Aspose.Pdf.

set-max-file-size-for-pdf-attachment.title: Set Maximum File Size for PDF Attachment Field
set-max-file-size-for-pdf-attachment.description: Shows how to limit the size of files that can be attached to a PDF form field to 2 MB using Aspose.Pdf's FileSizeLimitToMemoryLoading property.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv__v4.title: Export PDF Form Fields Metadata to CSV
export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv__v4.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its form fields, capture each field's name, type, and default value, and write the data to a CSV file for auditing.

create-pdf-form-fields-from-csv.title: Create PDF Form Fields from CSV Metadata
create-pdf-form-fields-from-csv.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, reading field definitions from a CSV file, and programmatically adding various form fields using Aspose.Pdf.

add-date-picker-field-with-current-date.title: Add Date Picker Field with Current Date to PDF
add-date-picker-field-with-current-date.description: Shows how to insert a date picker form field into an existing PDF and set its default value to the current system date using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-minimum-date-in-pdf-datefield.title: Validate Minimum Date in PDF DateField
validate-minimum-date-in-pdf-datefield.description: Demonstrates how to add a DateField to a PDF and attach JavaScript validation that rejects dates earlier than January 1 2000.

create-pdf-form-dynamic-list-box.title: Create PDF Form with Dynamic List Box
create-pdf-form-dynamic-list-box.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF document with a ListBox form field and dynamically add items to the list at runtime.

set-text-field-background-color.title: Set Text Field Background Color to Light Gray
set-text-field-background-color.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a TextBoxField by its name, and change its background color to light gray using Aspose.Pdf.

duplicate-rename-pdf-form-field.title: Duplicate and Rename PDF Form Field
duplicate-rename-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically copy an existing form field, assign each copy a unique name, optionally reposition them, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-email-validation-to-pdf-f.title: Add JavaScript Email Validation to PDF Form
add-javascript-email-validation-to-pdf-f.description: Demonstrates how to create or locate an 'Email' text field in a PDF form and attach JavaScript that validates the presence of the '@' character before accepting the input.

create-pdf-tax-calculation-form.title: Create PDF Tax Calculation Form with JavaScript
create-pdf-tax-calculation-form.description: Shows how to generate a PDF form containing Subtotal, Tax Rate, and Tax Amount fields and attach JavaScript that automatically computes the tax amount.

export-calculated-tax-to-xml.title: Export Calculated Tax from PDF Form to XML
export-calculated-tax-to-xml.description: Loads a PDF form, reads the "Amount" field, calculates a 10% tax, writes the result back to a "Tax" field, and saves the entire document (including form data) as XML for downstream processing.

import-tax-rate-xml-pdf-hidden-field.title: Import Tax Rate from XML into PDF Hidden Form Field
import-tax-rate-xml-pdf-hidden-field.description: Demonstrates reading a tax rate from an XML file and populating a hidden text box form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then saving the updated document.

set-noexport-flag-for-sensitive-pdf-form.title: Set NoExport Flag for Sensitive PDF Form Fields
set-noexport-flag-for-sensitive-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to mark sensitive form fields as non‑exportable (NoExport) using Aspose.Pdf, preventing them from being included in exported data.

batch-apply-custom-font-to-pdf-text.title: Batch Apply Custom Font to PDF Text
batch-apply-custom-font-to-pdf-text.description: Iterates through PDF files in a network folder, loads a TrueType font, and uses a TextFragmentAbsorber to replace the font of all text fragments with the custom font, saving the modified PDFs to an output folder.

highlight-required-pdf-form-field.title: Highlight Required PDF Form Field with Red Border
highlight-required-pdf-form-field.description: Loads a PDF, adds or updates a text box form field, marks it as required, and applies a red border to visually indicate missing input after submission.

auto-update-qr-code-from-text-field.title: Auto‑Update QR Code from Text Field
auto-update-qr-code-from-text-field.description: Shows how to attach JavaScript to a PDF text box so that its value automatically updates a QR code barcode field when the user changes the text.

export-pdf-form-to-xml-xsl-report.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML and Generate Custom Report via XSLT
export-pdf-form-to-xml-xsl-report.description: Demonstrates exporting form fields from a PDF to XML using Aspose.Pdf and then transforming the XML with an XSLT stylesheet to produce a custom HTML report.

import-xfa-xml-into-pdf.title: Import XFA XML Data into PDF Form
import-xfa-xml-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read transformed XML, assign the XML to the XFA form fields, and save the updated PDF.

create-pdf-multi-select-listbox.title: Create PDF with Multi‑Select List Box
create-pdf-multi-select-listbox.description: Demonstrates how to add a list box form field that allows multiple selections to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-multi-select-list-box-limited-sel.title: Create Multi-Select List Box with Limited Selections in PDF
create-multi-select-list-box-limited-sel.description: Demonstrates adding a multi-select ListBoxField to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and restricting the number of selectable items to three by pre‑selecting them.

add-hidden-ip-field-to-pdf.title: Add Hidden IP Address Field to PDF with JavaScript
add-hidden-ip-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a hidden text box form field into a PDF and attach JavaScript that can store the user's IP address when the form is opened.

add-ipv4-validation-to-pdf-textbox.title: Add IPv4 Validation to PDF Text Box Field
add-ipv4-validation-to-pdf-textbox.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a text box form field and attaching JavaScript that validates the entered value against an IPv4 regular expression.

create-pdf-form-digital-signature.title: Create PDF Form with Digital Signature Field and Certificate Validation
create-pdf-form-digital-signature.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field to a PDF form, sign it using a PKCS#7 certificate, verify the signature, and save the signed document.

create-required-signature-field-lock-pdf.title: Create Required Signature Field and Lock PDF After Signing
create-required-signature-field-lock-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a required digital signature field to a PDF, sign it with a PKCS#7 certificate, and then lock the document to prevent further changes.

export-pdf-signature-audit-xml.title: Export PDF Signature Information to XML Audit Log
export-pdf-signature-audit-xml.description: Loads a signed PDF, extracts each signature field's details and embedded certificate, and writes the information to an XML file for audit purposes.

import-xml-signature-data-and-sign-pdf.title: Import XML Signature Data and Sign PDF Form Field
import-xml-signature-data-and-sign-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading XFA signature data from an XML file, assigning it to a PDF form, locating a signature field, and applying a PKCS#7 digital signature using a PFX certificate.

create-pdf-form-with-password-field.title: Create PDF Form with Password‑Protected Field
create-pdf-form-with-password-field.description: Demonstrates adding a password entry textbox to a PDF form and encrypting the document so that a user password is required to open it while allowing form filling.

make-pdf-password-field-readonly.title: Make PDF Password Field Read‑Only
make-pdf-password-field-readonly.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a password box form field, set it to read‑only to protect its value, and save the updated document.

validate-wrong-password-prevents-access.title: Validate Incorrect Password Prevents Access to Encrypted PDF Form Field
validate-wrong-password-prevents-access.description: The example creates a PDF with a form field, encrypts it with user and owner passwords, and demonstrates that opening the file with an incorrect password throws an InvalidPasswordException, preventing access to the field value.

create-pdf-form-with-automatic-backup.title: Create PDF Form with Automatic Backup on Field Change
create-pdf-form-with-automatic-backup.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF form, add a text box field, and attach JavaScript that saves a backup copy each time the field is modified.

add-javascript-listener-to-pdf-form-fiel.title: Add JavaScript Listener to PDF Form Field
add-javascript-listener-to-pdf-form-fiel.description: Shows how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF form field using Aspose.Pdf so the script runs when the field's value changes.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v4.title: Export PDF Form Field Appearance Settings to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v4.description: Shows how to load a PDF document, access its form, and export all form field appearance settings to a JSON file for reuse in other templates.

import-form-appearance-from-json.title: Import Form Field Appearance Settings from JSON into PDF
import-form-appearance-from-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import form field appearance settings from a JSON file, and save the updated document.

create-collapsible-pdf-section.title: Create Collapsible PDF Section Controlled by Checkbox
create-collapsible-pdf-section.description: Demonstrates how to add a checkbox that toggles the visibility of a text box field using JavaScript, creating a collapsible section in a PDF form.

add-calculated-total-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add Calculated Total Field to PDF Form
add-calculated-total-field-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to create a PDF with Quantity and Unit Price number fields and a read‑only Total field that automatically calculates using JavaScript when values change.

export-total-price-to-xml.title: Export Calculated Total Price to XML
export-total-price-to-xml.description: Calculates a total price from a collection of items, optionally adds the value to a PDF, and saves the total as an XML file for use by an external invoicing system.

apply-xml-discount-rates-to-pdf-invoice.title: Apply XML Discount Rates to PDF Invoice Total
apply-xml-discount-rates-to-pdf-invoice.description: The example reads discount codes and rates from an XML file, calculates a discounted total for a given code, and inserts the result as a text fragment into a PDF invoice using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-form-with-pdf-only-attachment.title: Create PDF Form with PDF‑Only File Attachment Field
create-pdf-form-with-pdf-only-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to add a form field to a PDF that allows file selection and uses JavaScript validation to restrict the chosen file to PDF format only.

validate-pdf-form-file-attachment-size.title: Validate PDF Form File Attachment Size
validate-pdf-form-file-attachment-size.description: Shows how to check the size of a file selected in a PDF form's FileSelectBoxField and ensure it does not exceed a 5 MB limit before allowing submission.

add-progress-bar-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add Progress Bar Field to PDF Form
add-progress-bar-field-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to insert a read‑only TextBoxField into a PDF form and update its value and color to act as a progress bar as form sections are completed.

export-pdf-conversion-progress-to-xml.title: Export PDF Conversion Progress to XML
export-pdf-conversion-progress-to-xml.description: Demonstrates attaching a custom progress handler to an Aspose.Pdf conversion operation and writing each progress event to an XML file for external tracking.

add-localized-label-to-pdf.title: Add Localized Label to PDF Using JavaScript Dictionary
add-localized-label-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed a JavaScript dictionary of translations in a PDF and update a form field label based on the viewer's locale when the document is opened.

batch-generate-pdf-forms-from-template.title: Batch Generate PDF Forms from a Template Using Aspose.Pdf
batch-generate-pdf-forms-from-template.description: The example loads a PDF template and fills its form fields with data from a DataTable, creating a separate PDF file for each record.

add-submit-button-with-validation-to-pdf.title: Add Submit Button with Validation JavaScript to PDF
add-submit-button-with-validation-to-pdf.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a button field, attaches JavaScript that validates required form fields before submitting, and saves the updated document.

create-pdf-form-with-interaction-logging.title: Create PDF Form with Interaction Logging
create-pdf-form-with-interaction-logging.description: Shows how to add a hidden log field to a PDF form and attach JavaScript actions to other fields to record user interactions for analytics.

export-pdf-form-interaction-log-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Form Interaction Log to XFDF
export-pdf-form-interaction-log-to-xfdf.description: Loads a PDF containing a filled form and exports all annotations, including form field data, to an XFDF (XML) file for server‑side analysis.

import-xfdf-interaction-log-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Interaction Log into PDF
import-xfdf-interaction-log-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import annotations and interaction data from an XFDF (XML) file, and save the reconstructed PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-auto-updating-date-time-field-to-pdf.title: Add Auto‑Updating Date/Time Field to PDF
add-auto-updating-date-time-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a DateField into a PDF and attach JavaScript so the field displays the current date and time each time the document is opened.

create-read-only-date-field.title: Create Read‑Only Date Field in PDF
create-read-only-date-field.description: Shows how to add a DateField to a PDF, set its value to the current date‑time, mark the field as read‑only, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

conditional-pdf-form-section.title: Create Conditional PDF Form Section with Checkbox
conditional-pdf-form-section.description: Demonstrates how to add a checkbox to a PDF form and use JavaScript to show or hide another field based on the checkbox state.

export-annotation-visibility-to-xml.title: Export Annotation Visibility State to XML
export-annotation-visibility-to-xml.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF annotations, adjust their visibility/exportable flags, and save the document model to an XML file to preserve user preferences across sessions.

import-visibility-settings-from-xml-to-p.title: Import Visibility Settings from XML and Apply to PDF Annotations
import-visibility-settings-from-xml-to-p.description: The example reads an XML file containing visibility flags for sections and updates the matching TextAnnotation or PopupAnnotation objects in a PDF, then saves the modified document.

create-pdf-form-with-concatenated-barcod.title: Create PDF Form with Concatenated Barcode
create-pdf-form-with-concatenated-barcod.description: Shows how to add text fields to a PDF form and generate a Code128 barcode from the concatenated values of those fields using Aspose.Pdf.

dynamic-code128-barcode-from-text-field.title: Dynamic Code128 Barcode Linked to Text Field
dynamic-code128-barcode-from-text-field.description: Shows how to add a text box and a read‑only Code128 barcode field to a PDF and automatically update the barcode when the text field changes using JavaScript.

export-barcode-values-to-xml.title: Export Barcode Field Values to XML
export-barcode-values-to-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate its form fields, extract barcode field names and values, and write them to an XML file for inventory system integration.

pdf-form-language-dropdown.title: Create PDF Form with Language Dropdown and Dynamic Labels
pdf-form-language-dropdown.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF form containing a ComboBox for language selection and update label fields dynamically using JavaScript actions.
